titleStmt.title: SII 38.454: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 454. (A.R. No. 454 of 1912.) KŌṬṬŪR, MANNARGUDI TALUK, TANJAVUR DISTRICT. On the north base, maṇḍapa, infront of the central shrine, Koḻundīśvara temple.

p.hi: King: Tribhuvanachakkaravarttigaḷ Śrīvīrarājēndrachōḷa i.e. Kulōttuṅga Chōla III Year 3: Tula, ba. di. 9, i.e., Sunday, Āyilayam = 4th October, 1181 A.D. However, the regnal year was 4.

summary.p: This incomplete inscription records that a certain Selgalāṉamūṉṟu Kōṭṭūr Vāchchiyamārāyan, a drummer, who was a native of Tiruvaiyyāṟu, and possessed the right of beating the drum (ugachchakkāṇi) in Śrīmūlasthānam-uḍaiyar temple and Guṇavāḍīsvaram-uḍaiyār temple at Kōṭṭūr in Nenmali-nāḍu (a sub-division) of Rājēndrachōḻa-vaḷanāḍu, received a sum of 30 kāśu from Āmbar-uḍaiyān Ambalattamudhu Mūvāyirtoruvaṉ, a merchant residing at Daraṇichintāmaṇi-pperunteruvu in Gaṅgaikoṇḍachōḻapuram and gave an undertaking that he would get the cistern in the temple filled with water in the morning everyday. It is also recorded that the donor made an additional payment for the maintenance of both the well and piccottah (ēttam).

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tribhuvanacakkaravattikaḷ śrīvirarājendracoḻatevaṟku yāṇṭu munṟāvatu tulānāyaṟṟu Aparapakṣattu navamiyum nāyaṟṟukkiḻamai peṟṟa Āyileyamum Āna Anṟu rāje
ntracoḻavaḷanāṭṭu nenmalināṭṭuk koṭṭur Uṭaiyār śrīmulastāṉamuṭaiyār koyilum Uṭaiyār kuṇavātiśvaramuṭaiyār koyililum Ukaccakkāṇiyuṭaiya Ukaccan tiruvaiyāṟu celkalāna mun
ṟu koṭṭur vācciyamārāyanen kaṅkaikoṇṭacoḻapurattu taraṇi cintāmaṇipperunteruvil viyāpāri Āmparuṭaiyān Ampalattamutu muvāyirattoruvanukku nān Upaiyaṅkoṇṭu kalveṭṭik kuṭutta
paricāvatu Ikkoyil tiruvitittoṭṭikku ciṟukālaicanti niru toṭṭikku nirampa Iṟaikkakaṭavenākavum Innir Iṟaikkum Iṭattu kiṇaṟu toṇṭi Ettamuṅ Aḻivucerntu Ampalattamutu muvāyirat
toruvan tarakkaṭavanākavum Ippaṭi Aḻiva cerntutaṭatālRead cerntataṉālIvaṉ Inta Upaiyañ celutta māṭṭāmaiyil kuṭutta kācu muppatum vāṅki Inta Āmparuṭaiyāṉ piṉpu Iṭṭa kācu tum Āka kācuIncomplete.
Digital edition of SII 38.454 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
